sections.body: This section provides a breakdown of the property tax status for each relevant year, including payment history, parcel number, amounts, and due dates. Delinquent years are specifically flagged. Section organization follows the operator-required headers: LIENS, TAX STATUS (property taxes only), OWNERSHIP, OTHER MATTERS, and REVIEWER NOTES.

blocks.notes: 2025 property taxes are a statutory lien on the property under Florida law. As of February 28, 2026, they are assessed, not yet due and therefore not currently delinquent. No recording instrument for a tax certificate or sale is present.

sections.body: The following summarizes the chain of title and current vesting for 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157. Each conveyance is detailed below, ending with the current owner.

blocks.notes: First recorded ownership in chain. Instrument type is not specified in source materials.

citations.claim: Maria Santos acquired ownership in fee simple, recorded 2003-01-01.

spans.raw_text: [L28] - Maria Santos (fee simple, recorded 2003)

NOTE: The chain of title shows the following sequence of ownership:
- Maria Santos (fee simple, recorded 2003)
- Santos to Rodriguez, Carlos A. (warranty deed, recorded 2015)
- Current vesting: CARLOS A. RODRIGUEZ, a single man
